title: RJ45 Ethernet cable
visual_clue: Clear plastic RJ45 connector and cable clip
learner_action: Match cable to Ethernet port
prompt_or_source_note: Generate a realistic close-up photo of an RJ45 Ethernet cable on a neutral tabletop, no branding, clear connector clip visible
validation: Learner can distinguish Ethernet from USB and HDMI

title: Ethernet port on laptop or desktop
visual_clue: Rectangular Ethernet port with contact pins
learner_action: Match RJ45 cable to port
prompt_or_source_note: Generate or source a close-up image of an Ethernet port on a generic computer, neutral lighting, no logos
validation: Learner can identify where an Ethernet cable connects

title: HDMI cable and port
visual_clue: Flat trapezoid HDMI connector shape
learner_action: Match display cable to display port
prompt_or_source_note: Generate a realistic side-by-side photo of HDMI cable end and HDMI port, neutral background, no branding
validation: Learner can identify HDMI as a display connection

title: USB-A and USB-C comparison
visual_clue: Large shape difference between USB-A and USB-C
learner_action: Sort cable cards by connector type
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart illustration comparing USB-A and USB-C connectors with simple labels
validation: Learner can sort USB-A and USB-C correctly

title: RAM stick
visual_clue: Memory module with gold contacts
learner_action: Point to RAM and explain purpose
prompt_or_source_note: Generate a realistic photo of a desktop RAM stick on an anti-static mat, no branding
validation: Learner can identify RAM and handle it by the edges

title: SATA SSD and M.2 SSD comparison
visual_clue: Two storage form factors shown side by side
learner_action: Match storage type to device example
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart illustration comparing a 2.5 inch SATA SSD and an M.2 SSD
validation: Learner can tell the two storage types apart

title: Router switch client path
visual_clue: Router connected to switch and client devices
learner_action: Trace request path with finger
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart network diagram showing laptop to router to switch to desktop with directional arrows
validation: Learner can trace the path from client to router

title: DNS visual clue card
visual_clue: Website name changing into IP address
learner_action: Explain DNS in one sentence
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart card showing example.com becoming 93.184.216.34, with DNS as the lookup step
validation: Learner can explain DNS as name lookup

title: No display symptom card
visual_clue: Monitor standby light and powered desktop tower
learner_action: Choose first safe display checks
prompt_or_source_note: Create a simplified cartoon troubleshooting card with a desktop tower on, monitor standby light, and no image on screen
validation: Learner chooses monitor input and cable checks before replacing parts

title: Phishing email clue card
visual_clue: Urgent message with unknown sender and suspicious link
learner_action: Identify three phishing signs
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart fake phishing email teaching card with callouts for urgency, unknown sender, and mismatched link
validation: Learner identifies three phishing indicators without clicking

title: Windows storage low visual
visual_clue: Storage bar nearly full
learner_action: Choose safe cleanup check
prompt_or_source_note: Create a blue on white lineart generic OS settings illustration showing low disk space, no real Windows branding
validation: Learner identifies disk space as a performance clue

title: Troubleshooting board
visual_clue: Columns New Diagnose Fixing Document Done
learner_action: Move ticket through stages
prompt_or_source_note: Create a simplified cartoon help desk ticket board with five columns and one ticket moving across
validation: Learner follows ticket flow without skipping documentation

title: Laptop hardware map
render_style: generated PNG view set with code-native hotspots

validation: Learner can use the map as a clear visual reference without labels covering parts
